stories.headline: What To Watch This Week: 30+ Premieres, Finales, And More - TVLine
stories.summary: TVLine offers a look at the week ahead: A handy roundup of new TV premieres and finales to help you plan your viewing for June 21-27.

stories.headline: Gordon Ramsay's Daughter Announces She's Pregnant With His First Grandchild - TMZ
stories.summary: Gordon Ramsay's family kitchen will soon have a new set of hands ... because his daughter's pregnant!

stories.headline: James Burrows, legendary Hollywood director behind 'Cheers,' 'Friends' and 'Will & Grace,' dies at 85 - Fox News
stories.summary: James Burrows, the legendary "king of the multi-cam sitcom" who directed "Cheers," "Friends" and "Will & Grace," died at 85 surrounded by his loving family.

stories.headline: Netflix Wins ‘Sesame Street’ Movie Rights - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Rideback, the production company behind the billion-dollar live-action "Lilo & Stitch" and "Aladdin" movies, brought it to the studio and will produce.

stories.headline: Carrie Underwood shares patriotic video of American flag display near her Tennessee property - Fox News
stories.summary: Carrie Underwood shared a video of American flags lining a fence near her Tennessee home, expressing deep gratitude and patriotism on Instagram.

stories.headline: Jimmy Kimmel taps Rosie O’Donnell as rotating guest host during two-month hiatus - NBC News
stories.summary: Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel will take a two-month break from hosting his eponymous ABC program, tapping comedian and frequent Donald Trump foe Rosie O’Donnell as one of several guest hosts to fill i…

stories.headline: Dua Lipa reveals her Sicily wedding dress in new photos - USA Today
stories.summary: Dua Lipa stunned at her wedding in Sicily in a Chanel haute couture gown. See every angle of her wedding dress in photos.

stories.headline: Tom Hanks admits he'll 'get up and leave the room' if this 'painful' scene of his comes on - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Tom Hanks admitted that he will 'get up and leave the room' if this 'painful' scene from one of his most beloved movies comes on: 'I do this gesture that I just think is false.'
